summary: Completed testing for ScriptM8 Part 6 update: Training Modes removed from home screen, 6 training modes added to script detail screen with premium locking, all backend APIs verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Home screen (index.tsx): NO 'Training Modes' section - only 'AI Coaching' (4 tiles) and 'Script Tools' (4 tiles) sections
✅ Script detail (script/[id].tsx): 6 MODE_OPTIONS defined: Full Read, Cue Only, Recall, Character, Performance, Loop
✅ Premium locking: Performance and Loop modes have premium: true flag, show 'Premium' text and lock icon for non-premium users
✅ scriptStore.ts: API_TIMEOUT = 15000 (15s) for all API calls
✅ app.json: extra field has EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL fallback
✅ API: POST /api/scripts creates scripts with AI parsing successfully
✅ API: POST /api/acting-coach/analyze returns AI coaching analysis (scene_title, emotion, style, energy required)
✅ API: GET /api/dialect/accents returns 6 accent profiles (british_rp, american_general, australian, irish, scottish, southern_american)
✅ API: 404 returns structured error response with 'detail' field

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified via Playwright

test_credentials: N/A - No authentication required for tested endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_* prefixed scripts during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Part 6 testing complete. All backend APIs working: scripts CRUD, acting-coach/analyze, dialect/accents, health. Timeouts configured: API 15s, Upload 30s.

Home screen - 'Script Tools' section with 4 tiles
